title: Zenith X5 Bluetooth Over‑Ear Headphones
description: The Zenith X5 delivers immersive sound with deep bass and crystal‑clear highs, perfect for long listening sessions. Its plush memory‑foam ear cups and lightweight aluminum frame ensure comfort, while up to 30 hours of battery life keeps the music going. Includes a travel case and NFC pairing for instant connectivity.

attributes.special_features: Active Noise Cancellation, Quick Charge 5 min=1 hr

title: AstraTech Pro 15.6" Ultra‑HD Laptop
description: AstraTech's Pro 15.6" laptop combines a sleek magnesium‑alloy chassis with a 4K UHD display and 12th‑gen Intel i7 processor for professional performance. It features a backlit keyboard, Thunderbolt 4 ports, and a fingerprint reader for security. Ideal for creators who need power on the go.

title: PulseWave Mini Portable Projector
description: The PulseWave Mini projects crisp 1080p images up to 120 inches, making it perfect for movie nights and presentations. Its built-in Harman Kardon speakers and battery lasting up to 4 hours eliminate the need for external gear. Compact enough to fit in a backpack, it supports HDMI, USB‑C, and wireless Miracast.

title: Nimbus 5G Smartphone
description: Nimbus 5G packs a Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 chipset, 8GB RAM, and a 6.7" OLED display with 120Hz refresh for smooth performance. Its triple‑camera system captures detailed photos in low light, and the 5000 mAh battery provides all‑day use with fast 65W charging. Available in three vibrant colors.

title: EcoCharge 20000 mAh Power Bank
description: The EcoCharge power bank delivers 20000 mAh capacity with dual USB‑C Power Delivery ports and a 12V/2.5A output for laptops. Its solar panel adds emergency recharging capability, and the LED display shows remaining power. Built with a rugged, water‑resistant shell for outdoor adventures.

attributes.special_features: Solar charging, LED power indicator, Water‑resistant (IPX5)

title: VividStream 55" 4K Smart TV
description: VividStream's 55" 4K Smart TV offers HDR10+ support, a 120Hz refresh rate, and a full‑array local dimming panel for vibrant picture quality. The integrated voice assistant works with Alexa and Google Assistant, while the ultra‑thin bezel adds a cinematic feel. Includes multiple HDMI 2.1 ports for next‑gen gaming.

title: AeroDrone X2 Quadcopter
description: The AeroDrone X2 features a 4K 60fps camera with a 3‑axis gimbal for ultra‑smooth aerial footage. Its 30‑minute flight time, obstacle avoidance sensors, and return‑to‑home function make it beginner‑friendly yet capable. The compact folding design fits into a small backpack.

title: SoundPulse Bluetooth Soundbar 3.1
description: SoundPulse's 3.1 soundbar delivers rich, room‑filling audio with a wireless subwoofer and Dolby Atmos support. HDMI eARC, optical, and Bluetooth 5.2 connections provide versatile setup options. The sleek design complements any living‑room décor.

attributes.special_features: Dolby Atmos, Wireless subwoofer, HDMI eARC

title: PixelPro 24MP Mirrorless Camera
description: PixelPro's 24MP mirrorless camera features a high‑resolution BSI sensor, 5‑axis in‑body stabilization, and 4K video recording. The fast hybrid autofocus system captures sharp subjects, while the lightweight magnesium body is weather‑sealed for durability. Comes with a 16‑35mm kit lens.

title: GlideTech Wireless Gaming Mouse
description: The GlideTech wireless gaming mouse offers a 16,000 DPI sensor, ultra‑low latency 2.4 GHz connection, and customizable RGB lighting. Its ergonomic shape and 6 programmable buttons enhance precision for competitive play. Includes a rechargeable battery lasting up to 70 hours.

attributes.special_features: 16000 DPI sensor, RGB lighting, Programmable buttons

title: Nimbus Smart Home Hub
description: Nimbus Smart Home Hub centralizes control of lights, thermostats, and security devices via a touch screen interface and voice commands. Supports Zigbee, Z-Wave, Wi‑Fi, and Thread protocols for broad compatibility. Includes a built-in speaker for alerts and music playback.
